toolbarCompareModeStrictTitle: Strict mode: spaces and empty values both count as diffs
toolbarCompareModeStatusStrictHint: Strict mode is active: spaces, tabs, and empty-value differences are all preserved.
toolbarCompareModeStatusContentHint: Content mode is active: differences caused only by blank whitespace are ignored.
toolbarPickFileTitle: Choose a new working-copy file or diff target
toolbarSwitchFileTitle: Switch to another working-copy file or diff target
toolbarUpdateInstallConfirm: Installing the update will close the current comparison window and launch the installer. Continue?
devLoaderHintElectron: Pick one SVN working-copy file inside the Electron app. The app will load the same file across revisions and you can keep switching revisions from the header for debugging
appLoadingHint: The window is visible while large files are parsed and diffed in the background
appIdleHintElectron: Waiting for external diff arguments. Reopen the app with both input files to start a comparison.
homeStartHeroTitle: A cleaner way to review SVN diffs
homeStartHeroBody: Make text and Excel workbook diffs in SVN easier to read.
homeStartPickBody: Choose one working-copy file and jump into its diff view.
homeStartConfigBody: Connect SvnDiffTool to TortoiseSVN so routine diffs open here directly.
homeStartSupportHint: Designed for clear text and Excel workbook review in SVN.
svnConfigSubtitle: Choose a mode and file diffs started from TortoiseSVN will prefer SvnDiffTool.
svnConfigAvailabilityPackagedOnly: Use this from the installed desktop build
svnConfigDefaultCommandFallback: Still using the default diff viewer
svnConfigAllFilesBody: Open every file diff with SvnDiffTool.
svnConfigExcelOnlyBody: Only Excel files use SvnDiffTool. Other file types stay as they are.
svnConfigSupportHint: The configuration is written for the current Windows user. After that, file diffs started from TortoiseSVN will open with the same rule set.
revisionPickerPinnedSourcesHint: These are switch-back sources such as the working copy or input files; the current selection is still the highlighted commit below
revisionPickerNoDateResultsHint: Pick another date or clear the filter to view the full timeline
revisionPickerSearchRangeHint: Load older revisions to extend the search range
collapseJumpPrevTitle: Jump to the previous collapsed block (Alt+[)
collapseJumpNextTitle: Jump to the next collapsed block (Alt+])
searchPlaceholder: Search in diff… (Enter = next, Shift+Enter = prev)
gotoHint: Enter a line number between 1 and {totalLines}
gotoEmpty: There is no content available to jump to
gotoInvalid: Enter a valid line number greater than 0
gotoOutOfRange: Out of range. The highest available line is {totalLines}
gotoPreview: Press Enter or click Go to jump to line {lineNo}
aboutSubtitle: Windows SVN diff viewer with workbook-aware comparison and built-in update status.
aboutReleaseNotesEmpty: No release notes are available yet. Run an update check after publishing a GitHub Release to load them here.
aboutReleaseNotesDisabledHint: Release notes are unavailable in dev mode because automatic update metadata is not loaded.
aboutReleaseNotesUnsupportedHint: Release notes are currently only loaded for Windows automatic updates.
aboutReleaseNotesCheckingHint: Checking GitHub Releases now. Release notes will appear here after the request completes.
aboutReleaseNotesNoChangesHint: No newer release notes were loaded because the current build is already on the latest published version.
aboutUninstallConfirm: This will close the current comparison window, launch the system uninstaller, and remove SvnDiffTool settings plus controlled temp data. Continue?
aboutUpdateDisabledHint: Automatic updates are only available in packaged Windows builds.
aboutUpdateUnsupportedHint: Automatic updates are currently only implemented for Windows.
aboutUpdateErrorFallback: The update check failed. Try again later.
aboutUpdateAvailableHint: A newer release is available: {version}. You can download it from this dialog.
shortcutPrevCollapse: Jump to the previous collapsed block
shortcutNextCollapse: Jump to the next collapsed block
statsArtifactOnlyDiffHintPrimary: Workbook cell content is unchanged, but the workbook binary differs.
statsArtifactOnlyDiffHintSecondary: This usually comes from non-cell layers such as export timestamps, package structure, macro containers, or other metadata.
artifactNoticeTitle: This comparison has no cell-level changes, but the workbook artifact changed
artifactNoticeBody: This usually comes from non-cell layers such as export timestamps, package structure, macro containers, or other metadata. The main view still treats the workbook as content-equal.
sourceNoticeUnversionedTitle: This file is not under SVN version control
sourceNoticeUnversionedBody: It has been opened as a local file, so the content can still be viewed normally. SVN revision switching is unavailable for this file.
statsHints: F7 next · Shift+F7 prev · Ctrl+F search · Ctrl+G goto · F1 shortcuts
formulaBarHint: Select a cell to inspect its formula
formulaBarEmpty: The selected cell does not contain a formula
workbookContextRevealAllRows: Reveal all hidden rows on this sheet
workbookContextRevealAllColumns: Reveal all hidden columns on this sheet
tooltipWhitespaceSensitiveHint: Note: this difference is caused only by whitespace and is kept in Strict mode but ignored in Content mode.
tooltipClearedHint: Note: {mineLabel} cleared this cell while {baseLabel} still has content.
tooltipAddedHint: Note: {mineLabel} added content to this cell while {baseLabel} was empty.
